subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Sovereign of Manifestation, Who through His love called all things into being and by His bounty brought them into existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد سلطان ظهور را لایق و سزاست که بوجود حبیش اشیا را موجود فرمود جودش باو
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
